heading: Incorporating contract terms into written instrument
label: 41707 Incorporating contract terms into written instrument
text: To the extent the Secretary of Transportation prescribes by regulation, an air carrier may incorporate by reference in a ticket or written instrument any term of the contract for providing interstate air transportation.
